name: ProductTrapper
description: Product Hunt featured product tracker built with Astro 6, React Islands, and Cloudflare Workers
instructions: Refer to spec.md for the single source of truth. Developer token (PH_DEVELOPER_TOKEN) is only used during prebuild; never expose it to the client or Worker runtime. Generated posts.json lives in src/generated/posts.json and is copied to public/posts.json for the client.
